name: Toshin Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Toshin Group Co.,Ltd. supplies electrical equipment and materials. The company offers high voltage receiving boards, electric wires/cables, terminal processing products, distribution board control panels, VE conduit and accessories, electric circuit and insulating materials, TV hearing and measuring instruments, telephone poles and overhead wires, wood and interior products, lightning rods and equipment, air conditioners and ventilation fans, home appliances, and tools. It also provides high pressure, switch and control, wiring, disaster prevention, acoustic communication, communication, gas, building material housing, and OA equipment. The company was formerly known as Toshin Electric Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Toshin Group Co.,Ltd. in November 2006. Toshin Group Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
